/usr/bin/clang++-20 -g CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/cmd.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/create.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/create_controller.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/create_filter.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/create_model.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/create_plugin.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/create_project.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/create_view.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/help.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/main.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/press.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/version.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/cmake.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/config_json.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/config_yaml.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/demoMain.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/filter_cc.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/filter_h.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/gitignore.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/model_cc.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/model_h.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/model_json.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/plugin_cc.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/plugin_h.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/restful_controller_base_cc.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/restful_controller_base_h.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/restful_controller_cc.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/restful_controller_custom_cc.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/restful_controller_custom_h.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/restful_controller_h.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/test_cmake.cc.o CMakeFiles/drogon_ctl.dir/test_main.cc.o -o ../../../bin/drogon_ctl  -Wl,-rpath,/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/lib: ../../../lib/libdrogon.a ../../../lib/libtrantor.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lpthread -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/lib/libyaml-cpp.so.0.9.0 /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/lib/libuuid.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libhiredis.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so
